title: ASSESSMENT_WITHDRAWAL
description: Joint withdrawal of an active assessment before a CONTRIBUTION_RESULT is issued. Requires signatures from both Actor and Claimant. A single-party withdrawal request MUST be rejected by the Referee.

actor_signature.description: Ed25519 signature of the Actor over the canonical (JCS, RFC 8785) form of this message excluding both signature fields. Base64url-encoded.

claimant_signature.description: Ed25519 signature of the Claimant over the canonical (JCS, RFC 8785) form of this message excluding both signature fields. Base64url-encoded.
